title: SEM Analyst
required_skills: 3+ years in data/marketing analytics or SEM role with strong reporting/analysis focus
Proficiency in Tableau/Looker/BI tools for data visualization and dashboarding
Practical experience using SQL and Python (Pandas/NumPy) for data manipulation
bonus_skills: Experience/interest in AI for data automation/analysis
Background in maths, computer science, economics or related field
matched_skills: MS Power BI (certified) — matches BI tools requirement (required, weight 3)
SQL (basic) — partial match for SQL/Python requirement (required, partial weight 1.5)
KPI dashboards/ROI reporting — partial match for analytics experience (required, partial weight 1)
MBA in Business — partial match for economics/related field background (bonus, partial weight 0.5)
missing_skills: Google Ads hands-on experience (Google Analytics listed, not Google Ads)
Joining ad platform data with CRM/internal metrics
core_responsibilities: Build and maintain SEM performance dashboards on top of existing data infrastructure (70% reporting/analysis focus)
Develop Google Ads API expertise to extract granular keyword, bid strategy and audience-level data
Connect paid search activity to downstream business outcomes by joining ad platform data with internal metrics
Design and track A/B tests from hypothesis through to actionable conclusions
Support creation, management and optimisation of paid search campaigns across Google Ads and Microsoft Ads
recommended_emphasis: Highlight MS Power BI certification prominently as it directly satisfies the BI dashboarding requirement
Expand on any SQL usage in past roles (Hapag-Lloyd KPI reporting, HSBC budget tracking) with concrete examples
Reframe KPI dashboard and ROI reporting experience to emphasise analytical depth and data-driven decision making
If any exposure to Google Analytics campaign data or paid media reporting exists, surface it explicitly
Acknowledge MBA economics background to partially satisfy the 'related field' bonus criterion
